candidate_check.description: Solicited Remote Assistance must not be allowed.

check_content_excerpt:
If the following registry value does not exist or is not configured as specified, this is a finding:

Registry Hive: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE
Registry Path: \SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Terminal Services\

Value Name: fAllowToGetHelp
 
Value Type: REG_DWORD
Value: 0
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> System >> Remote Assistance >> "Configure Solicited Remote Assistance" to "Disabled".
title: Solicited Remote Assistance must not be allowed.
